userMessage: Set CH1 to 50mV DC 50ohm for power rail monitoring, CH2 to 1V DC for reference clock. Set trigger on CH1 rising edge 25mV normal mode holdoff 100us. Enable average acquisition 128 waveforms. Add measurements: mean, RMS, pk2pk, high, low, positive overshoot on CH1. Add frequency on CH2. Query all results. Save CH1 waveform as CSV for post-processing and take screenshot.

actionsJson.summary: Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.

flow.name: Power Rail Monitoring with Reference Clock
flow.description: Configure CH1 for 50 mV/div DC 50 ohm power rail monitoring, CH2 for 1 V/div DC reference clock, set CH1 rising-edge normal trigger with 25 mV level and 100 us holdoff, enable 128-waveform averaging, add measurements, query results, save CH1 waveform as CSV, and capture a screenshot.

params.command: TRIGger:A:TYPe EDGE; TRIGger:A:EDGE:SOUrce CH1; TRIGger:A:EDGE:SLOpe RISe; TRIGger:A:LEVel:CH1 25E-3
MEASUrement:ADDMEAS MEAN; MEASUrement:ADDMEAS RMS; MEASUrement:ADDMEAS PK2Pk; MEASUrement:ADDMEAS HIGH

children.label: Add CH1 and CH2 Measurements Part 2

params.command: MEASUrement:ADDMEAS LOW; MEASUrement:ADDMEAS POVERSHOOT; MEASUrement:ADDMEAS FREQUENCY
MEASUrement:MEAS1:SOURCE CH1; MEASUrement:MEAS2:SOURCE CH1; MEASUrement:MEAS3:SOURCE CH1; MEASUrement:MEAS4:SOURCE CH1
MEASUrement:MEAS5:SOURCE CH1; MEASUrement:MEAS6:SOURCE CH1; MEASUrement:MEAS7:SOURCE CH2
